meaning: n.<英>自动提词机(为电视讲话人或演出者逐行映出语句,相当美国英语的Tele Prompter)
examples: Puzzled, they put the autocue under scrutiny to see if there was anything unusual about it.
She also told him that after that, she regularly checked the autocue, but never saw the red point again.
The second step to break free of PowerPoint as your autocue is to have a printout of your PowerPoint slides.
There's little in the way of anecdote, and it looks like he's reading it off an autocue.
But Mr Jones kept going, the autocue came back to life and the messages started flowing pretty freely.
